channel.title: Futuristic on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Futuristic on Tech Tracker

item.title: Ratio : The futuristic Android home launcher is it worth trying?
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-b8bFHpmcJik/Yw5jcD46QsI/AAAAAAAANaQ/sg8k1HTBw_cd2x4PGPZb3iF4cdxjXFWfwCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1661887339866359-0.png" alt=""> There are many operating systems available available for smartphones out of them Apple’s iOS and Google’s Android are most popular and well known around the world while iOS is closed source operating which means no one else can use it and then comes Android an open source operating system due to that almost all mobile companies who were unable to use iOS started using Android to install on thier smartphones and sell globally.
